evals.prompt: Improve plugins/example/skills/report-builder after eval feedback says the output got worse on two cases. Preserve a baseline snapshot before changing it.
evals.expected_output: Identifies the target skill, requires or confirms test prompts before editing, creates a baseline snapshot, runs the old-skill baseline and candidate against the same prompts, captures outputs and feedback, then revises from the comparison.

assertions.name: requires_baseline_snapshot
assertions.check: creates or requires a baseline snapshot before editing the target skill

assertions.name: same_prompt_comparison
assertions.check: compares old and improved skill behavior using the same prompts

evals.prompt: The first improve-skill iteration produced user feedback: case A is too verbose, case B lost a required JSON field, and case C is fine. Update the skill without overfitting.
evals.expected_output: Focuses on specific feedback, generalizes the lesson, preserves passing behavior, keeps the prompt lean, explains why new instructions matter, records iteration history, and avoids narrow per-case hacks.

assertions.name: feedback_driven_iteration
assertions.check: uses feedback to drive the next iteration while preserving successful cases

assertions.name: generalize_not_overfit
assertions.check: generalizes from feedback instead of hard-coding case-specific rules

evals.prompt: After rewriting an existing skill, run the required cleanup step before evaluating iteration 2. The changed files are SKILL.md and agents/helper.md.
evals.expected_output: Invokes ai-assistant-ops:md-bloat-hunter as a post-rewrite, pre-evaluation step on the changed skill context, keeps tested behavior and trigger coverage intact, then reruns all test cases into the next iteration.

assertions.name: rerun_all_cases
assertions.check: reruns all test cases into the next iteration

evals.prompt: The improved skill body is stable, but it sometimes misses casual requests and sometimes triggers for adjacent documentation cleanup. Optimize the description.
evals.expected_output: Builds should-trigger and should-not-trigger prompts, includes near misses, checks trigger misses and false positives, and updates only the trigger-only description based on those results.

assertions.name: description_stays_trigger_only
assertions.check: keeps workflow details out of the description
